## Meeting purpose

[Discuss Koala's growth strategy and Marcel's startup journey, including potential fundraising.](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tido is seeking a new head of growth for Koala, ideally someone who can balance PLG and enterprise demand gen](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Marcel's startup (fwd.digital) is growing rapidly, reaching $105K MRR with 15 customers and 7 full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Marcel is considering fundraising but is hesitant, mainly to bring on a technical co-founder and accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Both agreed to explore collaboration opportunities, including SEO projects and potential candidate introductions](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)

## Topics

### Koala's growth challenges and needs

  - [Struggling with top-of-funnel growth despite good sales conversion](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Seeking a growth leader who can balance PLG-style onboarding and enterprise demand gen](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Considering creative campaigns like SEO projects (e.g., summarizing 10-Ks) to drive organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Exploring the idea of "static lists" in the product to improve user activation](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Marcel's startup success and growth

  - [Reached $105K MRR with 15 customers after just three workshops](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Hired 7 full-time employees, mostly offshore, maintaining a 70% profit margin](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Growing through word-of-mouth and workshop-driven lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Considering fundraising to bring on a technical co-founder and accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Ideal growth leader profile

  - [Passionate power user with marketing/growth background](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Ability to build in public, engage with the ecosystem, and teach others](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Balance between hands-on execution and strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Technical enough to understand and leverage the product, but not necessarily a software engineer](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Fundraising considerations for Marcel

  - [Hesitant to raise, but recognizing potential benefits for partnerships and talent acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Considering a 50/50 equity split with a potential technical co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Debating between staying a profitable service business or scaling into a larger software/tech company](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Tido advising to aim for a "go big" strategy with the right partner, not necessarily tied to raising a lot of money](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

### Collaboration opportunities

  - [Marcel offering to help Koala with SEO projects, either through his agency or by sharing workshop materials](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2576.0)
  - [Tido considering using Marcel's expertise to evaluate potential growth leader candidates](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2675.0)
  - [Both agreeing to keep an eye out for suitable candidates in their networks](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tido to roll up sleeves and start the SEO project for Koala](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2547.0)
  - [Marcel to send workshop materials and potentially offer agency support for Koala's SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2576.0)
  - [Tido to make introductions for potential growth leader candidates (including Jean-Denis)](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Marcel to keep an eye out for potential technical co-founder candidates](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2733.0)
  - [Both to coordinate plans for upcoming trip to Brazil for Neto's wedding](https://fathom.video/share/JCzbsJC-xqrC2ZLXpc1w_kdjszy5BNsA?tab=summary&timestamp=2968.0)
